inputs.label: Number of Turns (N)
inputs.businessContext: Number of turns in the coil

inputs.label: Time Interval (Δt)
inputs.businessContext: Time over which the magnetic field changes

inputs.label: Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle between magnetic field and normal to the loop

formulas.inducedEMF: n * dB * A * Math.cos(theta * Math.PI / 180) / dt
formulas.inducedEMFAbs: Math.abs(n * dB * A * Math.cos(theta * Math.PI / 180) / dt)

breakdown: Induced EMF (ε) = N * ΔB * A * cos(θ) / Δt
